name: OnDeck
description: OnDeck is a small business lending platform that provides partner APIs for submitting loan applications, checking business health scores via the OnDeck Score, managing loan products including term loans and lines of credit, and processing repayments.

hasOfferCatalog.name: OnDeck Lending API
hasOfferCatalog.description: REST API providing partner access to OnDeck's small business lending platform, supporting credit pre-qualifications, loan application submission, business health score retrieval via the OnDeck Score, loan product management, and repayment processing.
